chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3616 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مِنَ اَلْمُرُوءَةِ اِسْتِصْلاَحُ اَلْمَالِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3616 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Part of honor and dignity is managing wealth properly."
